introSection: Green Hornet: High Speed Chase is a steel wild mouse roller coaster at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is located in the park's Columbia Pictures zone and is themed around the Green Hornet movie.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Green Hornet: High Speed Chase is a Gerstlauer Bobsled Coaster.

fullText:
Green Hornet: High Speed Chase is a steel wild mouse roller coaster at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is located in the park's Columbia Pictures zone and is themed around the Green Hornet movie.

Green Hornet: High Speed Chase is a Gerstlauer Bobsled Coaster.
